WellID: #  1. DELETE the example rows at the bottom of this file.
#  2. ADD one row per completed well from your previous campaigns.
#  3. ALL columns are required. Minimum 5 wells.
#  ONLY TWO COLUMNS DRIVE THE SIMULATION:
#  The engine resamples these two columns (bootstrap) to build the
#  duration distributions. All other columns are metadata for the
#  audit output — they do not affect simulation results.
#  FracDaysPerStage  — use stages pumped to design. Exclude screen-outs
#    if they are already captured as a separate risk event.
#  MillingDaysPerPlug — use actual milling time / (plugs installed +
#    contingency plugs). Include contingency plugs in the denominator.
#  METADATA — used in audit output only
#    FracDays        : total pumping days for this well
#    CementEvalDays  : CT/wireline time for cement evaluation (0 if offline)
#    MillingDays     : total milling days for this well
#  USED BY ENGINE — fill in accurately:
#    StagesCompleted  : stages actually pumped to design
#    ContingencyPlugs : extra plugs set due to failures (0 if none)
#  [KEY] SIMULATION INPUTS — compute from the values above:
#  VALIDATION WARNINGS the app will raise:
#    StagesCompleted != StagesPlanned  flag curtailed wells for review
